content.en:
"Lord Yunsen's body has suddenly fallen!"

Ye Tian was shocked by the news.

Before, they all thought that the Lord of Yunsen was going to attack the Eternal Master, and this was the only way to fall, because the fourth-level Peak Legendary Realm Lord had almost reached the extreme of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, and he could attack the Eternal Master.

The result was beyond their expectations.

According to the information revealed by the Cloud Saint Sect, as well as the Peak Legendary Realm Lords themselves spying into time and space, it was finally confirmed that the body of the Cloud Sen Lord had been cultivating in the Cloud Forest Sea of the Cloud Saint Sect.

As a result, Lord Yunsen's body and clone were almost killed directly at the same time.

"The Eternal Master has struck!"

Ye Tian could only guess like this.

Except for the Eternal Master, who can instantly destroy the body and clone of the Lord of Yunsen, and it is silent

The border lord came to Ye Tian and said, "Endless Lord" Seven One Seven, you understand the situation about the fall of Lord Yunsen, what do you think?"

Ye Tian said lightly: "It should have offended a certain Eternal Master, so he was killed?"

The border lord smiled and said: "It may be, but maybe the real situation may be more complicated, but it is certain that the Lord of Yunsen is more unlucky, otherwise the peak Legendary Realm Lord of the fourth level, even if the clone falls, the main body will not fall." However, this matter is very complicated, and I am just guessing, so I dare not say more. After all, it really involves the Eternal Master, and I don't dare to get involved. "

Ye Tian nodded, the matter of the Eternal Controller, if they were involved, they would indeed be looking for death.

At this time, the news of Lord Yunsen's killing completely spread throughout the Void Region, and many forces knew about it.

Sunrise Mountain.

The white-bearded old man naturally knew about the fall of Lord Yunsen for a long time.

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain stood next to the white-bearded old man and asked, "Master, Lord Yunsen was not killed by attacking the Eternal Master, but was killed, could it be that the Eternal Master did it?"

"Yes!"

The white-bearded old man nodded slightly.

"Why did the Eternal Ruler kill Lord Yunsen?" said Lord Shaking Mountain in surprise.

The white-bearded old man sighed: "Actually, it's a normal fight, but he is more unlucky, the clone was killed, and the other party directly used the doppelganger as the source and killed his body, without the eternal controller to protect him, his body was also killed." "

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain was even more confused, where did this happen, how could he not know?

And the white-bearded old man didn't say much, because the level of the Shake 1 Lord was too low, and he was not qualified to come into contact with such secrets, and it was no good to know too much.

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain was also very knowledgeable and didn't ask too much

Time passed slowly, and the matter of the fall of Lord Yunsen passed like this, although there were many peak Legendary Realm lords who wanted to investigate, but everything was pretty much the same.

However, everyone speculates that it has something to do with the Eternal Master.

...

Sea of clouds, forests.

The first batch of cloud marrow liquid was produced, and Ye Tian and the border lord were directly divided.

"Let's try it!"

Ye Tian swallowed these cloud marrow liquids, and the energy of the cloud marrow liquid immediately acted on Ye Tian's space-time supreme body, slowly refining them, and the effect was very mild.

After a long time, all of these cloud marrow liquids were refined by Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian's space-time supreme technique did not make much progress.

"It's okay, after a long time, absorbing countless cloud marrow liquid, you can also refine and improve the space-time supreme body by one percent, and at my level, it is very difficult to improve every bit of strength, let alone improve the space-time supreme body by one percent. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

In these years, Ye Tian has been contemplating in front of the Moire Monument, improving his own time and space fusion, and contemplating other Dao paths by the way.

Although the Moire Tablet mainly improves the fusion of time and space, it is also of some help in assisting in the control of other Dao.

The Border Lord only sent a clone, and that clone entered the Yunsen Domain for a period of years of cultivation.

this day.

The Frontier Lord came out of the Yunsen Domain and said, "Endless Lord, it's time for you to enter the Yunsen Domain. "

"Good!"

Ye Tian's other copy body appeared and entered the Yunsen Domain, and this copy body is still here to comprehend the Cloud Pattern Tablet, anyway, he has a lot of copy bodies, and they are all very idle, so naturally he can send two copy bodies to practice here

In this regard, the border lord also has no opinion.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian entered the Yunsen Strange Domain, and suddenly countless strange forces were refining his will.

This tempering method is somewhat similar to the Mad Demon Sea, but the Mad Demon Sea will make people crazy, while the power of the Yunsen Strange Domain is not so dangerous, but it is still a little upsetting.

But on the whole, Yun Sen Domain is many times better than the Mad Demon Sea, at least after reaching the half-step eighth-order Eternal Will, the Mad Demon Sea is of little use to him, but Yun Sen Veil Domain still has some use for him....... ，

"Yunsen Realm is indeed good, if you cultivate here for a long time, your will can at least improve a lot, even if you can't step into the eighth-order Eternal Will, at least you can go some distance on the half-step eighth-order Eternal Will path. Ye Tian thought to himself

Immediately, he continued to temper his will in the Yunsen Domain.

When the time came, he went out and let the border lord enter the place.

The two of them changed their cultivation in this way, and the effect was not bad.

Before you know it, thousands of eternal epochs have passed.

"I have already mastered more than one hundred and seventy paths, and there is still a long way to go from three hundred paths, and the half-step eighth-order eternal will has been greatly improved, and the space-time supreme body has also been improved by almost one percent. This time, the Cloud Forest Sea has greatly improved me, but unfortunately it will be more difficult to continue to improve later. "

Although the Cloud Forest Sea was of little help to Ye Tian, he was still not ready to leave.

If you have been cultivating for endless years, you can still improve some of your strength, and until there is no better choice, continuing to cultivate in the Cloud Forest Sea is the only choice.

After another period of time, Ye Tian once again created a space-time supreme technique.

This space-time supreme skill is a domain-type space-time supreme skill, once it is deployed, it can form an absolute realm, completely suppress the enemy, and make it difficult for the enemy to escape.

This space-time supreme technique, Ye Tian named it the space-time forbidden domain!

With the creation of the space-time forbidden domain, the strength of 2.9 Ye Tian has also increased a little again, but the overall strength has not increased much.

"The fusion of time and space has reached its peak, and the space-time supreme body has reached its peak, creating multiple space-time supreme techniques, so that you can step into the fourth level of the peak legendary realm lord, it is too difficult to get to this step. "

Ye Tian muttered.

But if it wasn't difficult, there wouldn't be so few fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lords in the Void Region, and there would be very few.

In the following days, the lord of Ye Tian's border occasionally discussed and exchanged a word or two, hoping to enhance his understanding, and the relationship between the two was gradually eased, and the previous contradictions were nothing.

this day.

During an exchange, the Frontier Lord made an invitation.

"Endless Lord, there is a place that I want to invite you over, but it's a bit dangerous, it's easy to fall a clone, I wonder if you're interested?" said the Frontier Lord. _

16. To see the ununderlined version of the novel, please download the Flying Novel APP!
